text:
Once upon a time in the verdant heart of Evergreen Forest, there lived a young and curious qilin named Lumine. Lumine was known throughout the forest for her shimmering coat that changed colors with the light, reflecting the beauty around her. She had a gentle nature and an insatiable curiosity about the world beyond her home.

One sunny morning, Lumine decided to explore the forest further than she ever had before. As she ventured deeper, the trees grew taller and more mysterious, and the sunlight filtered through the leaves in a kaleidoscope of colors. Suddenly, she heard a soft rustling in the bushes. Peering carefully, she saw a small, injured fawn lying on the ground, its leg twisted and bleeding.

Without hesitation, Lumine approached the fawn and gently examined it. She knew that the fawn needed help, so she used her innate magical abilities to tend to its wounds, her breath healing the broken bones and her touch mending the flesh
